entry.title: How to revert a wrong transaction in ICICI Bank?
entry.content: To report Unauthorized transactions not initiated by you, call our Customer Care or 7600-786-212 with following details: Transaction Reference Number.

entry.content: To report Unauthorized transactions not initiated by you, call our Customer Care or 07600-786-212 with following details: Transaction Reference Number.

entry.title: Default Work Order Type change in 'Create Maintenance Request apps'
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While I am exploring one of our client requirement to create custom Work Order type which is copy of YA01, Could you please suggest below ?

Is it possible to change default work order type of YA01 while creating Emergency work order from ‘Create Maintenance request apps’ to Custom Work order type ( exact copy of YA01 with initial 2 letters are different ?)

Scenario : When we select ‘Notification Processing Context’ to ‘Emergency Work’ in Create Maintenance Notification – upon Submit, System to create Notification of Y1 type and Work Order of XX01 instead YA01 ?

Thanks,

R

entry.title: Re: Structure Formatting for Receiver in SAP CPI through...
entry.content:
Hello Nidhi, 

Please try with below Groovy script and update if required for your changing message payload structure.

I usually test groovy scripts via the various online Cloud Integration specific IDE's viz.
https://ide.contiva.com/
https://groovyide.com/cpi

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import groovy.xml.*

// Function to process the incoming message
def Message processData(Message message) {
    // Get the body of the message as a String
    def body = message.getBody(String)
    def result

    try {
        // Parse the XML body using XmlParser
        def xmlParser = new XmlParser(false, false)
        def rootNode = xmlParser.parseText(body)

        // Prepare to build the new XML output
        def writer = new StringWriter()
        def xmlBuilder = new MarkupBuilder(writer)

        // Create the root structure as per input XML
        xmlBuilder.ServiceNowIncident {
            // Traverse through Incident node
            rootNode.Incident.each { incident ->
                Incident {
                    // Process each child node of Incident
                    incident.children().each { childNode ->
                        if (childNode.name() == 'AssignedTo') {
                            // Handle AssignedTo, extract email if present
                            def emailMatch = (childNode.text() =~ /([^<\s]+@[^>]+)/)
                            if (emailMatch) {
                                AssignedTo(emailMatch[0][0])
                            } else {
                                AssignedTo(childNode.text().trim())
                            }
                        } else if (childNode.name() == 'AdditionalComments') {
                            // Handle AdditionalComments, remove tags and extract text
                            def commentText = childNode.text().replaceAll(/<[^>]+>/, '').replaceAll(/\s+/, ' ').trim()
                            def nameCommentSplit = commentText.split("\\(", 2)
                            def cleanedComment = nameCommentSplit[0].trim()
                            if (nameCommentSplit.size() > 1) {
                                cleanedComment += " - " + nameCommentSplit[1].replace(")", "").trim()
                            }
                            AdditionalComments(cleanedComment)
                        } else {
                            // Handle other nodes as they are
                            "${childNode.name()}"(childNode.text())
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        // Convert the writer output to string
        result = writer.toString()

    } catch (Exception e) {
        // Fallback for malformed XML handling via basic string operations
        def output = new StringBuilder("<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>\n<ServiceNowIncident>\n")
        def inIncident = false

        // Fallback processing using split lines logic
        body.split('\n').each { line ->
            if (line.contains('<?xml') || line.contains('<ServiceNowIncident>') || line.contains('</ServiceNowIncident>')) {
                return
            }
            if (line.contains('<Incident>')) {
                inIncident = true
                output.append("  <Incident>\n")
                return
            }
            if (line.contains('</Incident>')) {
                inIncident = false
                output.append("  </Incident>\n")
                return
            }
            if (inIncident) {
                if (line.contains('<AssignedTo>')) {
                    def emailMatch = (line =~ /([^<\s]+@[^>]+)/)
                    if (emailMatch) {
                        output.append("    <AssignedTo>${emailMatch[0][0]}</AssignedTo>\n")
                    } else {
                        output.append("    ${line.trim()}\n")
                    }
                } else if (line.contains('<AdditionalComments>')) {
                    def comment = line.replaceAll(/<[^>]+>/, '').replaceAll(/\s+/, ' ').trim()
                    output.append("    <AdditionalComments>${comment}</AdditionalComments>\n")
                } else {
                    output.append("    ${line.trim()}\n")
                }
            }
        }
        output.append('</ServiceNowIncident>')
        result = output.toString()
    }

    // Set the transformed XML as the body of the message
    message.setBody(result)
    return message
}

entry.title: Re: Installing Cristal Server 2020 in Windows Server 2019...
entry.content: Thanks. Its resolved now.

entry.title: Re: Unknown Service Method: DA Service Message (405) in I...
entry.content: Thanks for the reply - we completed everything as per the the SAP and OpenText guides - and the connection was working but stopped. We are investigating an issue on the OpenText side which seems to be causing the error in SAP. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
hello @David_Chaviano 
I’m a recent Business Administration graduate with some experience in finance . I’m really eager to dive deeper into SAP, as I know these skills are key to unlocking more job opportunities and building a solid career in finance and consulting.

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Plans - several skipped in one day and on...
entry.content:
hi Vijay

I checked and task list created before maintenance plans! any other thoughts?

kind regards,

Mary

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello, @David_Chaviano. 

I'm from Brazil and currently in the process of changing careers which is not an easy task, as many here know. I'm a SAP consultant at an early career stage and it would help me a lot if I could participate in the Digital Skills Initiative. I think I also would be classified as a "first generation college student" since my parents, unfortunately, didn't had the chance to go to college. 

I can send the screenshot of the completed learning path to digitalskills@sap.com  before 1 December 2024.

Best regards,

Tulio

entry.title: Re: Help – Why don't I get a situation notification?
entry.content:
@Tkokate : The text of the email can be changed in the situation template.

I have a question: Can I aggregate the email, so that instead of sending multiple emails ( each email for each document identified by the situation ), the situation sent just one email? I have look a the aggregation feature, but it aggregates just under the bell icon. I want to aggregate the email out, but not the notifications in Fiori.

Best Regards:

Luis Lara.

entry.title: Re: 如何在public cloud中实现AR AP凭证批量上传的ABAP开发？
entry.content: Hi Janet, 如果之前你如下帖子中提供的方案您认为都无法满足您的需求的话， S/4HANA Public Cloud 如何批量上传AR, AP和AA的凭证 - SAP Community 那建议您参考以下Help Portal Documentation中的方案， https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/533228e1e854433ab16d013f161ca509.html Extensibility in SAP S/4HANA Cloud consists of the following options: • Key User Extensibility through built-in capabilities • Developer Extensibility through the SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment • Side-by-Side Extensibility through SAP BTP 如果您这边有BTP的部署，那么如上方案可以参考。 Kind Regards, Lucy

entry.title: Re: Notifications for Message-Based Situations
entry.content:
Great Post Angelika.

I have developed a custom situation handling for promotions by status. Is working, but the user is complaining that is getting too many emails. My question is: it is possible to aggregate just the email out?, so the user gets just one email to remind them to go to the My Situations - Extended and action the individual items.

Thanks in advance:

Luis Lara.

entry.title: How can I get money back from a wrong account in PNB?
entry.content: Call PNB customer care at 07600786212 or visit your local branch as soon as possible . 2. Report the Transaction: - Provide details of the wrong transaction, including the transaction ID, amount, date, and recipient's details

entry.title: What is the refund policy of PayZapp?
entry.content: If a payment is unclaimed, denied or refunded 7600-786-212 for any reason, we will return the money to your Account within 30 Days of the date you initiate payment.

entry.title: Re: What is the refund policy of PayZapp?
entry.content: If a payment is unclaimed, denied or refunded 070600-786-212 ...=×for any reason, we will return the money to your Account within 30 Days of the date you initiate payment.

entry.title: Need to reextend My Leave request app using BAS after SAP note implementation
entry.content:
We are going live on next week, and recently we implemented few SAP notes which updated standard My leave request app.

 

Due to which our extended app does not work properly

 



We have to re-extend standard app on top of upgraded standard app.

 

Need you intervention for re-extending standard my leave request app using BAS.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Need to reextend My Leave request app using BAS after...
entry.content:
KBA 2586584 - Extended Fiori Application does not work properly after upgrading standard Fiori Applications

Resolution
Re-extend any previously-extended controllers, views, or i18n files using the new standard code as a base template.

KBA 3267846 - How to create an Adaptation Project to extend a SAP standard Application
https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/fioritech/3362178926.html

especially
Chapter 3 - Create an Adaptation Project
 Create an Adaptation Project 
 Open SAPUI5 Visual Editor
 Perform UI changesTroubleshooting Tips
 Extend views with XML fragments
 Extend controllers with Controller Extensions

entry.title: Adivasi Hair Oil Contact Number 99.72.08.38.81
entry.content:
Adivasi  Hair Oil Contact Number +919972083881

 

Adivasi Hair Oil Contact Number 9972083881 Original Website Price

 

Adivasi Hair Oil Contact Number: +91 9972083881, 09972083881.

 

Adivasi Hair Oil Whatsapp Contact Number: +919972083881 or 09972083881.

 

 

Adivasi hair oil, like many herbal oils, may have properties that promote hair health and growth. However, its effectiveness may vary from person to person. Consider trying it as part of a holistic hair care routine that includes scalp massages, proper nutrition, and lifestyle adjustments. For personalized advice on addressing hair loss, consult with a healthcare professional or explore my Quora Profile for more insights on natural remedies.

 

Adivasi hair oil benefits for hair growth

  1. Improves blood circulation to roots.

  2. Controls hair fall.

  3. Helps to relieve stress.

  4. Gives hair more volume.

  5. Increases hair thickness & strength.

  6. Boosts the growth of thinning edges.

  7. Treats dandruff and split ends.

  8. Enhances the texture of the hair.

..

 

..

.

.

.

..

...

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

 

.

 

.

.

.

.

.

.

 

.

.

..

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

 

..

.

entry.title: Re: Add Custom Fields to SAP S/4HANA Business Partner OData API Entities
entry.content:
HI @dishat 

As mentioned in note 2839177 - Extending ODATA Service API_BUSINESS_PARTNER - SAP for Me. It is not possible to add standard fields that are not part of the API. If required, you must submit a customer influence.

Best Regards!
